violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Convection oven not located under hood.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store box of cups off floor in BOH storage area.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. BOH hand sink not accessible due to product storage during construction. Maintain accessibility to encourage proper hand washing.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Current remodel construction to BOH storage area. Adding addition to lottery room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in BOH storage and walk in cooler have debris build up and needs cleaning.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Multiple Deli Express sandwiches not date marked.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Wooden knife block holder used.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Seal bare wood surfaces. Shelving edges etc..

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. BOH hand sink has items stored all around it making accessibility difficult.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed. Unable to locate refuse can in BOH area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling in BOH area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in areas.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling in BOH area has partially repaired ceiling.
